Seed Launch Timeline:
List Building
Module 6
You don’t need a big list for a Seed Launch
• You can do this with a list of 50 to 300 people
(bigger is okay)
• Once you create a product in your Seed Launch
you could leapfrog list growth with a couple JV
Partners in your next launch
• You just need a little list to get yourself a product
built with the Seed Launch
Building your list…
• Go through the Launching Your List Bonus when
it’s released
• Start contributing to forums (be valuable)
• Put a few videos on YouTube
• Use social media
• Drive people back to your squeeze page
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 1 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	2
Building your list…
• To get a list of 50 – 300 people is easy once you:
• Create your lead magnet
• Put up an opt-in form
• Use the traffic sources mentioned to drive
people to your squeeze page
Building your list…
• Try to get 30 people in your Seed Program
• If your list is super engaged motivated you could
get away with 10 or 12 people in your program
(but 30 is better)
• With my first Product Launch Workshop I sold 6-
9 spots…
• So I ended up filling it with my friends, contacts,
people who I knew were interested (I comped
them in)
• I ended up in that 30-40 person range
Seed Launch Timeline:
Launching
Module 6

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	3
This is a general timeline (you don’t have
to follow this exactly)
The Seed Launch Timeline…
• Day 1: Initial announcement (start of Prelaunch –
this could be your Shot Across the Bow)
• Day 3: Follow-up, answer questions
• Day 5: Program details
• Day 7: Open Cart (send them to sales
video/letter)
• Day 8: Follow-up and social proof
• Day 9: Scarcity and social proof
The Seed Launch Timeline…
• Day 10: Scarcity, social proof, and Close Cart
(maybe 2 emails)
• It’s basically a 4 day Open Cart (days 7, 8, 9, 10)
• Day 11: Start program (you don’t have to start it
the next day)
• Day 18: Second module/call
• Day 25: Third module/call
• This can be however many modules you want
(3-5 works well)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 4 --

© Internet Alchemy, Inc. All rights reserved. 	4
The Seed Launch Timeline…
• Some people have the modules/calls every two
or three days (Monday, Wednesday, Friday) and
it’s done within a week
• Immediately after your program ends, start
building out your product for a full launch
• With my original Product Launch Workshop, I
took everything I taught and I redid it 100%
• You can simply take what you record in your
Seed Launch and just get your product done
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
